WildWest_skip: There is nothing interesting in this wilderness!
WildWest.name: Wild Wasteland
SmokeTest.name: Smoke Test
Tutorial.name: Training
captain.name: Captain
tutorial.complete.title: Training complete!
tutorial.complete.message: You mastered the basics, bonus items, obstacles, level rewards, and survived the Captain's rage lesson. The road is open.
tutorial.dialog.welcome: Listen closely, fool. I am the Captain, and while you are under my protection, you will do this properly. On the map, touch only the glowing available point. Finish the job and the next one opens. Hesitate and the wasteland will eat you alive—and I refuse to bury another brainless idiot.
tutorial.dialog.battle: In combat, swap neighboring items and match three or more. Strike with weapons, patch your mistakes with bandages, and use shields to curb the enemy's rage. Think fast, weakling, and do not whine: Dolly will keep hitting until the lesson reaches your bones. I will not let you die from your own stupidity. Move.
tutorial.advanced.dialog.assessment: Well, fool. Others have done even worse in the first part, so you may consider that a pass. Do not grin, idiot: that was only the warm-up.
tutorial.advanced.dialog.lesson: You can match not only three items, but four and even five at once. Those combinations work harder and leave bonus items behind. I am going to hammer that into your empty skull, weakling.
tutorial.chest.text: A find for you, dimwit: 100 gold. Do not lose it before you learn how to use it.
tutorial.shop.text: Buy equipment that will save you in battle. Take both packs: five skulls and five gloves. Do not make me explain it twice, idiot.
tutorial.shop.wrong: No, weakling. Take both required packs, then pay and confirm the purchase.
tutorial.doctor.text: The doctor will patch you up completely. Get used to it: that luxury may not be there in battle.
tutorial.items.dialog.assessment: If battles were decided by skill alone, softlings like you would not survive being torn away from their mother's apron strings.
tutorial.items.dialog.items: The skull activates every item in a three-by-three area. The glove lets you move an item to any cell. They will help when different obstacles appear on the battlefield. Remember it, dimwit.
tutorial.levelUp.intro: At last you have learned something, fool. Earn more combat experience and perhaps you may become a strong fighter one day. Every new level earns you a reward. Inspect every option first.
tutorial.levelUp.standardItem: A bullet and other standard items improve the effectiveness of their matching board item. The more of these rewards you take, the better they work, idiot.
tutorial.levelUp.poweredItem: A powered shield and other powered items increase the chance that their enhanced version appears on the board. Every copy raises that chance, weakling.
tutorial.levelUp.redSerum: Red serum increases your maximum health. It lets you take more hits before you collapse, fool.
tutorial.levelUp.greenStim: Green stimulant increases the healing provided by bandages. Even a weakling like you will patch up faster.
tutorial.rage.dialog.intro: Well, runt, you are almost a man now. You still need to meet the enemy's rage. When the rage timer reaches its end, the enemy performs a special move. It can radically change the situation and tear your pathetic tactics apart. I will demonstrate personally.
tutorial.captain.defeat: One kick and you fall apart? Fine, fool. I will be gentler next time.
tutorial.final.dialog.farewell: Well, fool. At least you will not fall apart after the first kick anymore. You know the basics, you have seen rage, and you learned to break shields. Consider yourself ready for the road. Do not make me regret saying that.
enemy.Captain.tutorial.description: The Captain personally demonstrates why enemy rage cannot be ignored.
enemy.Captain.tutorial.retry.description: The Captain holds back his strike but hides behind ten shields.
enemy.Captain.stage.deadly.name: A personal demonstration
enemy.Captain.stage.softened.name: The Captain's gentle mode
enemy.Captain.ultimate.kick.name: Corrective kick
enemy.Captain.ultimate.kick.deadly.descr: After 10 seconds the Captain deals 1000 damage. This lesson cannot be survived.
enemy.Captain.ultimate.kick.softened.des: After 60 seconds the Captain deals 10 damage. A clock can stop the timer.
battle.reward.tutorial.captain: The Captain concedes. Take the experience and hear his final word.
battle.tutorial.captain.title: The Captain's final lesson
battle.tutorial.captain.clockRequired: Use the clock first, fool. Then you may start swinging weapons.
battle.tutorial.captain.useClock: Since everything ends too quickly for you, use a clock and stop the rage timer, fool. I gave you five of them. Click the clock and remember how to buy yourself time.
battle.tutorial.captain.breakShields: Now the shields, idiot. The Captain has ten, and each shield fully absorbs one attacking item's hit. Match three knives and watch three shields break instead of losing health.
battle.tutorial.captain.shuffle: See that, weakling? Three knives removed three shields. Now shuffle the board and finish the Captain without my hand guiding your empty head.
enemy.Dolly.name: Dolly
enemy.Dolly.description: A patient sparring partner for the training fight.
enemy.Dolly.stage.training.name: Training round
enemy.Dolly.ultimate.training.name: Patience
enemy.Dolly.ultimate.training.descriptio: Dolly waits while you practice the basic match-3 actions.
battle.reward.tutorial.basic: The first lesson is over. Claim the experience and keep moving.
battle.reward.tutorial.advanced: Advanced training complete. Claim the experience you earned.
battle.reward.tutorial.obstacles: Obstacle lesson complete. Claim the experience you earned.
battle.tutorial.title: Combat training
battle.tutorial.advanced.title: Advanced training
battle.tutorial.obstacles.title: Obstacles and active items
battle.tutorial.wrongMove: Do not improvise, idiot. Follow the highlighted move.
battle.tutorial.step.matchBullets: Match bullets to damage the enemy.
battle.tutorial.step.matchGrenades: Match grenades to deal heavy damage.
battle.tutorial.step.matchKnives: Watch closely, fool. Match three knives. Knives, bullets, and grenades damage the enemy, but every attack raises their aggression.
battle.tutorial.step.matchBandages: Bandages now, weakling. Match three and patch yourself up. Healing saves your hide, but it also builds enemy aggression.
battle.tutorial.step.matchTrash: Match the junk, idiot, and remember: it does nothing useful—it only raises aggression. Fill the meter and the enemy hits you.
battle.tutorial.step.matchShields: Shields, fool. Match three to lower enemy aggression. Sometimes the best hit is the one you never let them land.
battle.tutorial.step.matchFour: Match four items to create a powered item.
battle.tutorial.step.matchFive: Match five items for an even stronger result.
battle.tutorial.step.useGenerator: Combine the battery with a neighboring item.
battle.tutorial.step.shuffle: Now defeat Dolly. First shuffle the board, weakling. Shuffling hurts you, but rebuilds the entire board. Press the shuffle button.
battle.tutorial.shuffleRequired: Leave the board alone, idiot. Press shuffle first.
battle.tutorial.advanced.matchFourLine: Four bullets in a row, fool. Complete the match: it hits harder than a normal three and leaves a powered bullet behind.
battle.tutorial.advanced.matchFourSquare: Four identical items can also form a 2 by 2 square. Complete the bullet square and earn another powered bullet.
battle.tutorial.advanced.matchPowered: Powered items are twice as effective as normal ones. Match a powered bullet with two normal bullets and watch the damage, weakling.
battle.tutorial.advanced.matchFive: Five items in one row create a generator. Match five bullets and do not miss the highlighted move, idiot.
battle.tutorial.advanced.useGenerator: Select the generator, then a bandage. It activates every bandage on the board, gives maximum healing, and raises no enemy aggression.
battle.tutorial.advanced.shuffle: The new lessons are over. Shuffle the board, take the required hit, and finish Dolly, fool.
battle.tutorial.obstacles.wall: A wall will not let items pass through each other, fool. Try twice to swap the grenade and bandage on opposite sides of it.
battle.tutorial.obstacles.wallRetry: Again, idiot. The wall did not go anywhere.
battle.tutorial.obstacles.glove: The glove swaps any two items, even through a wall. Select it, then the bandage and grenade to make three grenades in a row.
battle.tutorial.obstacles.vine: A vine holds its item fast: you cannot move it. Try twice to move the highlighted knife, weakling.
battle.tutorial.obstacles.vineRetry: One more try, fool. The vine has a stronger grip than you do.
battle.tutorial.obstacles.clearVine: Now match three knives beside the vine. The match will hit the trapped item and tear that junk loose.
battle.tutorial.obstacles.flames: See the burning barrels in the corners? Every normal move burns you. Make the three highlighted moves and feel it, idiot.
battle.tutorial.obstacles.flamesAgain: Another move, weakling. The barrels do not get tired of burning you.
battle.tutorial.obstacles.flamesLast: One last move. Remember the cost of stalling, fool.
battle.tutorial.obstacles.skull: The skull activates everything in a three-by-three area. Select it and strike the center of the barrels to destroy them all at once.
battle.tutorial.obstacles.gold: Gold can be spent during combat: select it, then the barrel. For 15 coins it becomes another random item. Do it, fool.
battle.tutorial.obstacles.shuffle: Lesson over. Shuffle the board, pay its price, and finish Dolly, idiot.

patch_pet.name: Patch

enemy.Cherry.name: Cherry
enemy.Cherry.description: Junk can appear in the fight, and she heals from trash already on the board.
enemy.Cherry.stage.main.name: Ripe Threat
enemy.Cherry.ultimate.trashHeal.name: Junk Feeding
enemy.Cherry.ultimate.trashHeal.descript:
Rage: heals for each {item:trash_1} {item:trash_2} {item:trash_3} on the board.
Special: {item:trash_3} can appear in the fight.
enemy.Fireman.name: Fireman
enemy.Fireman.description: Flame barrels can appear in the fight, and starting walls get in the way.
enemy.Fireman.stage.main.name: Fire Alarm
enemy.Fireman.ultimate.flameDamage.name: Flame Burst
enemy.Fireman.ultimate.flameDamage.descr:
Rage: deals 2 damage for each {item:flame} on the board.
Special: {item:flame} can appear in the fight; the fight starts with walls.
enemy.Toxxy.name: Toxxy
enemy.Toxxy.description: Chemical barrels can appear in the fight.
enemy.Toxxy.stage.main.name: Chemical Alarm
enemy.Toxxy.ultimate.chemicalDamage.name: Chemical Burst
enemy.Toxxy.ultimate.chemicalDamage.desc:
Rage: deals 4 damage for each {item:chemical} on the board.
Special: {item:chemical} can appear in the fight.
enemy.Venom.name: Venom
enemy.Venom.description: Radioactive barrels can appear in the fight and hurt after ordinary swaps.
enemy.Venom.stage.main.name: Radioactive Alarm
enemy.Venom.ultimate.radioactiveDamage.d:
Rage: deals 6 damage for each {item:radioactive} on the board.
Special: {item:radioactive} can appear in the fight; radioactive barrels hurt the player after ordinary swaps.
enemy.Foxy.name: Foxy
enemy.Foxy.description: Heals from bandages, weakens the player's healing, and powered bandages can appear in the fight.
enemy.Foxy.stage.main.name: Clever Dressing
enemy.Foxy.ultimate.bandageHeal.name: Bandage Feeding
enemy.Foxy.ultimate.bandageHeal.descript:
Rage: heals 2 for each {item:Bandage} {item:Bandage_power} on the board.
Special: {item:Bandage_power} can appear in the fight; all bandages heal the player 20% less and add 20% more aggression.
enemy.test.name: Test Unit
enemy.test.description: A utility enemy for checking combat through the WildWest opening dialog.
enemy.Cookie.name: Cookie
enemy.Cookie.description: Rage litters part of the board, and junk matches add more aggression.
enemy.Cookie.stage.main.name: Crumbly Trouble
enemy.Cookie.ultimate.weaponToTrash.name: Trash Crumbs
enemy.Cookie.ultimate.weaponToTrash.desc:
Rage: litters part of the board.
Special: all junk {item:trash_1} {item:trash_2} {item:trash_3} adds 20% more aggression.
enemy.Rusty.name: Rusty
enemy.Rusty.description: Punishes trash on the board and makes junk matches nastier.
enemy.Rusty.stage.main.name: Rusty Raid
enemy.Rusty.ultimate.trashDamage.name: Rusty Trash
enemy.Rusty.ultimate.trashDamage.descrip:
Rage: deals 1 damage for each {item:trash_1} {item:trash_2} {item:trash_3} on the board.
Special: all junk adds 20% more aggression.
enemy.Sweety.name: Sweety
enemy.Sweety.description: Bullets deal less damage, add more aggression, and powered bullets can appear in the fight.
enemy.Sweety.stage.main.name: Sweet Barrage
enemy.Sweety.ultimate.bulletDamage.name: Bullet Payback
enemy.Sweety.ultimate.bulletDamage.descr:
Rage: deals 1 damage for each {item:bullet} {item:bullet_power} on the board.
Special: {item:bullet_power} can appear in the fight; all bullets deal 20% less damage and add 20% more aggression.
enemy.Candy.name: Candy
enemy.Candy.description: Knives deal less damage, add more aggression, and powered knives can appear in the fight.
enemy.Candy.stage.main.name: Sweet Cut
enemy.Candy.ultimate.knifeDamage.name: Knife Payback
enemy.Candy.ultimate.knifeDamage.descrip:
Rage: deals 1 damage for each {item:Knife} {item:Knife_power} on the board.
Special: {item:Knife_power} can appear in the fight; all knives deal 20% less damage and add 20% more aggression.
enemy.boom.name: boom
enemy.boom.description: Grenades deal less damage, add more aggression, and powered grenades can appear in the fight.
enemy.boom.stage.main.name: Explosive Setup
enemy.boom.ultimate.knifeDamage.name: Grenade Counter
enemy.boom.ultimate.knifeDamage.descript:
Rage: deals 1 damage for each {item:granate} {item:granate_power} on the board.
Special: {item:granate_power} can appear in the fight; all grenades deal 20% less damage and add 20% more aggression.
enemy.Bully.name: Bully
enemy.Bully.description: Starts shielded, makes shields calm the fight less, and powered shields can appear in the fight.
enemy.Bully.stage.main.name: Shield Push
enemy.Bully.ultimate.shieldRestore.name: Shield Nerve
enemy.Bully.ultimate.shieldRestore.descr:
Rage: restores 1 shield for each {item:Shield} {item:Shield_power} on the board.
Special: starts with 15 shield; {item:Shield_power} can appear in the fight; all shields give 20% less calm.
enemy.Rocket.name: Rocket
enemy.Rocket.description: Starts shielded, then explodes during rage.
enemy.Rocket.stage.main.name: Rocket Windup
enemy.Rocket.ultimate.kamikaze.name: Kamikaze
enemy.Rocket.ultimate.kamikaze.descripti:
Rage: deals damage to the player equal to the enemy's current health, then the enemy takes the same damage.
Special: starts with 5 shield.
enemy.Boss_1.description: A staged boss used to test future match-3 combat rules.
enemy.Boss_1.stage.windup.name: Windup
enemy.Boss_1.stage.storm.name: Storm
enemy.Boss_1.stage.hurricane.name: Hurricane
enemy.Boss_1.ultimate.dustToBandage.name: Dust Medicine
enemy.Boss_1.ultimate.dustToBandage.desc: Turns all {item:trash_1} {item:trash_2} {item:trash_3} on the board into {item:Bandage}.
enemy.Boss_1.ultimate.bandageHeal.name: Greedy Healing
enemy.Boss_1.ultimate.bandageHeal.descri: Heals for each {item:Bandage} {item:Bandage_power} on the board.
enemy.Boss_1.ultimate.shieldRestore.name: Greedy Shield
enemy.Boss_1.ultimate.shieldRestore.desc: Restores shield for each {item:Shield} {item:Shield_power} on the board.
enemy.Boss_1.ultimate.kamikaze.name: Kamikaze
enemy.Boss_1.ultimate.kamikaze.descripti: Deals damage to the player equal to the enemy's current health, then the enemy explodes for the same amount.
enemy.Boss_1.ultimate.grenadePunish.name: Blast Tax
enemy.Boss_1.ultimate.grenadePunish.desc: Deals damage for each {item:granate} {item:granate_power} on the board, then turns {item:granate} into {item:trash_1} {item:trash_2}.
enemy.Boss_1.ultimate.frozenField.name: Frozen Field
enemy.Boss_1.ultimate.frozenField.descri: Freezes random items and heals from {item:trash_1} {item:trash_2} {item:trash_3} on the board.
trader.text_01: Hey, traveler. I have useful goods, if your gold is too shy.
trader.text_02: Rare stock, fair prices. Mostly fair.
healer.text_01: Sit closer to the fire. Wounds do not stitch themselves.
healer.text_02: I can get you standing again, but medicine is costly these days.
reward.gold.text_01: You found a small stash of gold.
reward.item.text_01: Something useful waits among the dust.
healer.paidThanks: Here is the payment for healing: {price}.
events.heal.title: Healing
ui.purchase.question: Make purchase?
surrender.question: Running already, puppy?
menu.title: Wild Wasteland
log.validationPassed: Data check passed: {maps} map config(s), {languages} locale(s).
log.mapGenerated: Map generated: {map}. Levels: {levels}, nodes per level: {min}-{max}.
log.healOpened: Healer at {node}: restores {amount} HP, price {price}, HP {current}/{max}.
events.shop.title: Trader
dialog.sweety.hello: Hello, traveler. The road is moody today, but I know a few ways around it.
dialog.sweety.hint: Sometimes a conversation opens the path better than a bullet. Sometimes, naturally, the opposite.
dialog.sweety.startChoice: Sweety blocks the road with a grin and four suspiciously convenient options: a test fight, a trader, a doctor, or a quick reward. Balanced? Doubtful. Useful? Annoyingly, yes.
dialog.patchPet.hello: A small brass fox trots out of the dust, checks the road twice, and taps a tiny route note. It seems built for careful steps and useful discoveries.
dialog.patchPet.notes: Patch keeps a neat little checklist: local paths, clear logs, no mystery shortcuts. Then it wags at two marked places on the map.
level.1.text: You are at the beginning of the road.
level.2.text: You learned enough to claim a small prize.
level.3.text: Experience settles into a useful habit.
level.4.text: You have reached the current peak of training.
items.health.name: Health
items.health.description: Current and maximum health for this run.
items.exp.name: Experience
items.exp.description: Total experience and progress toward the next level.
items.Bandage.name: Bandage
items.Bandage.description:
Improves healing from {item:Bandage} by 1,
 improves healing from {item:Bandage_power} by 2.
items.Bandage_power.name: Power Bandage
items.battary.name: Battery
items.battary.description: Combine it with a neighboring item to activate all items of that type without aggression. Combine two batteries to activate the whole board.
items.bullet.name: Bullet
items.bullet_power.name: Power Bullet
items.granate.name: Grenade
items.granate.description:
Improves damage from {item:granate} by 1,
 improves damage from {item:granate_power} by 2.
items.granate_power.name: Power Grenade
items.item_gold.name: Gold
items.item_gold.description: Currency used for traders and paid services.
items.item_skull.name: Skull
items.item_skull.description: A map item gained from rewards or bought from traders.
items.item_swap.name: Glove
items.item_swap.description: A map item reserved for future swap actions.
items.item_time.name: Clock
items.item_time.description: A map item reserved for future time actions.
items.red.name: Serum
items.green.name: Stimulator
items.Knife.name: Knife
items.Knife.description:
Improves damage from {item:Knife} by 1,
 improves damage from {item:Knife_power} by 2.
items.Knife_power.name: Power Knife
items.Shield.name: Shield
items.Shield.description:
Improves calm from {item:Shield} by 1,
 improves calm from {item:Shield_power} by 2.
items.Shield_power.name: Power Shield
items.trash_1.name: Junk
items.trash_1.description: A junk match-3 item with rough side effects.
items.trash_2.name: Junk
items.trash_2.description: A junk match-3 item with rough side effects.
items.trash_3.name: Junk
items.trash_3.description: A junk match-3 item with rough side effects.
items.radioactive.name: Radioactive charge
items.radioactive.description: A dangerous item that sharply raises aggression.
items.flame.name: Flame barrel
items.flame.description: A dangerous item that raises aggression and hurts the player after an ordinary move.
items.chemical.name: Chemical barrel
items.chemical.description: A dangerous item that raises aggression and hurts the player after an ordinary move.
battle.noMoves.title: NO AVAILABLE MOVES
battle.noMoves.body: No moves available. Press Shuffle to take damage equal to the enemy attack and shuffle the board.
battle.outcome.restartPending: Battle restart will be added in the next step.
battle.status.selectFirstCell: Choose a cell, then choose a neighboring cell to swap.
battle.status.cellSelected: Cell selected. Now choose a neighbor.
battle.status.newCellSelected: New cell selected. Swaps require a neighbor.
battle.status.boxBlocked: That cell is covered by a box.
battle.status.vinesBlocked: That cell is tangled in vines and cannot be used normally.
battle.reward.test: The enemy is down. Claim the spoils.
battle.reward.Boss_1: The storm has fallen. Take what remains.
battle.reward.Cherry: Cherry has fallen apart. Take what has not rotted yet.
battle.reward.Fireman: Fireman has gone quiet. Take the reward before everything lights up again.
battle.reward.Toxxy: Toxxy has settled into a poisonous cloud. Take the reward while the air is only technically unsafe.
battle.reward.Venom: Venom has stopped glowing with intent. Take the reward before the board starts clicking.
battle.reward.Foxy: Foxy has backed off. Take the reward before she wraps the whole fight back up.
battle.reward.Cookie: Cookie has crumbled. Take the reward before the crumbs become trash.
battle.reward.Rusty: Rusty has fallen apart into rust. Take the reward before the board fills with junk.
battle.reward.Sweety: Sweety has backed off. Take the reward before the bullets keep arguing.
battle.reward.Candy: Candy has backed off. Take the reward before the knives continue the conversation.
battle.reward.boom: boom has burned out. Take the reward while the grenades pretend nothing happened.
battle.reward.Bully: Bully has backed off. Take the reward before he builds another shield out of your patience.
battle.reward.Rocket: Rocket exploded and left loot behind. Surprisingly practical.
battle.reward.example: Victory in battle brought a reward.
